flow: Approved the seeded Build Week Brief
Created and saved WorkshopLM editorial from the existing Style sheet
Created a separate empty Weekly client update Workshop
Added a real local meeting note and approved its Brief
Opened Style and saw the saved Style as the only primary choice
Applied the saved Style in one click

visualEvidence.observed: The new Workshop shows one saved Style row and one secondary Create another style action; website/manual fields remain hidden until requested.

stalenessProof: A service test applies a different saved Style to a Workshop with a current deck and verifies the deck and Storyboard become stale, Storyboard approval is revoked, and the applied Style remains current.
boundary: Saved Styles are reusable local snapshots. Updating a library entry does not silently mutate existing Workshop versions. Provider media and external cold-use evidence remain separate open requirements.
